description: Whether hooks can filter which tools or events they respond to using name matching, regex patterns, or structured criteria.

amp.mechanism: hook_match_input_contains: Amp hooks can match on input content containing specific strings

claude-code.mechanism: hook_matcher_patterns: exact string, pipe-separated list, or JavaScript regex; matches on tool_name or event-specific fields

cline.mechanism: Cline hooks fire on configured lifecycle events; no per-tool pattern matching documented

codex.mechanism: hook_matcher: Codex hooks support pattern matching to filter which tools or events trigger the hook

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks fire on all events of their configured type; no per-tool filtering documented

factory-droid.mechanism: Factory Droid hooks fire on configured lifecycle events; no per-tool pattern matching documented

gemini-cli.mechanism: hook_matchers: Gemini CLI hooks support event and tool name matching to filter when hooks fire

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks fire on configured lifecycle events; no per-tool filtering documented

pi.mechanism: Pi hooks fire on configured lifecycle events; no per-tool filtering documented

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf hooks fire on all events of their configured type; no per-tool or regex matching documented
